# graphql/CountContacts

## Overview

Get total contact count with optional VQL filters applied. Accepts VQLQueryInput with filters (optional, nested AND/OR filter logic). Returns Int representing total contact count matching the filter criteria. Uses Connectra service for count retrieval. Useful for pagination UI and displaying total results before fetching actual data.

## GraphQL operation

```graphql
query CountContacts($input: VQLQueryInput) { contacts { contactCount(input: $input) } }
```
